name: Plan Mode Tool Usage
description: Tests that EnterPlanMode and ExitPlanMode are called ONLY during initial project setup, not during workflow phases. During workflow phases, update_planner_stage should be used instead.
systemPrompt: You are a video generation orchestrator. You must follow the workflow rules exactly. EnterPlanMode/ExitPlanMode are ONLY for initial project setup. During workflow phases, use update_planner_stage instead.

tools.name: EnterPlanMode
tools.description: Enter initial project planning mode. ONLY use at the very start of a NEW project.

tools.name: ExitPlanMode
tools.description: Exit initial project planning mode. ONLY use after user approves the initial plan.

tools.name: update_planner_stage
tools.description: Update the planner stage within the current workflow phase (planning, verify, refining, complete)

tools.name: transition_phase
tools.description: Transition to the next workflow phase

tools.name: Task
tools.description: Dispatch a subagent to perform a task

context.phase_instructions: A user has provided a new story idea. Begin initial project planning.

cases.name: In PLAN mode after analysis: should ask for approval before ExitPlanMode

context.phase_instructions: You have analyzed the input and created a plan. Present it to the user for approval.

cases.name: In PLAN mode after user approval: should call ExitPlanMode

context.phase_instructions: The user has approved your execution plan. Now call ExitPlanMode to start the workflow. Do NOT call EnterPlanMode - you are already in plan mode.

cases.name: PLOT phase: should NOT call EnterPlanMode

context.phase_instructions: Create a plot outline for the story using the Task tool.

cases.name: PLOT phase completion: should NOT call ExitPlanMode

context.phase_instructions: User has approved the plot content. You should call read_project or update_planner_stage. Do NOT call EnterPlanMode or ExitPlanMode.

cases.name: STORY phase: should NOT call EnterPlanMode

context.phase_instructions: Create the full story from the approved plot.

cases.name: STORY phase completion: should NOT call ExitPlanMode

context.phase_instructions: User has approved the story content. You should call read_project or update_planner_stage. Do NOT call EnterPlanMode or ExitPlanMode.

cases.name: CHARACTERS_SETTINGS phase: should NOT call EnterPlanMode

context.phase_instructions: Create character profiles and setting descriptions.

cases.name: Phase transition: should NOT call plan mode tools

context.phase_instructions: Plot phase is complete. You may call read_project or transition_phase. Do NOT call EnterPlanMode or ExitPlanMode - those are only for initial project setup.

cases.name: IMAGE phase: should NOT call plan mode tools

context.phase_instructions: Generate reference images for characters using read_project and Task.

cases.name: VIDEO phase: should NOT call plan mode tools

context.phase_instructions: Generate video clips for scenes using read_project and Task.

cases.name: Existing project resume: should NOT call EnterPlanMode

context.phase_instructions: Resume work on the existing project's story phase.
